title: Change in behavior results in failed BRAM inference

features.name: ram with constant zero write enable
features.description: Code should include a RAM inference construct where the write enable is tied to a constant 0 value, causing writes to be permanently disabled

features.name: memory array with conditional write
features.description: Code should include a memory array declaration with a conditional write operation inside a clocked always block

features.name: ram write enable port connected to constant zero wire
features.description: Code should include a RAM module instantiation where the write enable port is connected to a constant zero wire rather than a register
